$schema_note: Cards for the portfolio build. status: backlog|todo|doing|review|done. Agents pick cards where owner_agent = you, status = todo, and all depends_on are done. Every card also passes code-reviewer -> qa-engineer -> producer before done.

cards.summary: Scaffold Next.js 15 (TS, App Router) + Tailwind + Prettier/ESLint. NOTE: repo root is non-empty — scaffold into a temp dir (npx create-next-app@latest tmp-scaffold --ts --tailwind --app --eslint) then merge files into root, keep our CLAUDE.md/docs/.claude intact.

cards.summary: Global layout: sticky header (name, nav, GitHub link, theme toggle) + footer.

cards.evidence: components/sections/header.tsx, components/sections/footer.tsx, components/sections/nav-link.tsx, components/ui/icons.tsx; wired into app/layout.tsx (header/main/footer landmarks + skip link); build+lint green; verified single <main id=main-content>, aria-current=page on active nav link (checked /about), all 6 routes + 404 return correct HTTP status on prod server. QA PASS 2026-07-06 (code review passed prior): build+lint green; prod server curl on all 6 routes + /nope (200x6, 404x1); exactly one <main>/<header>/<footer> per route (raw HTML, all 6 routes), nav aria-label=Main present, skip link first focusable element on every route; aria-current=page verified present exactly once and on the correct link on / (0 matches — no Home nav item, correct), /projects, /projects/aiklao (Projects active on child route), /about, /resume, /contact; headless-Edge CDP (Emulation.setDeviceMetricsOverride, not --window-size which mis-sized the viewport and produced a false-positive overflow artifact — noted as a tooling gotcha) confirmed scrollWidth===clientWidth (no horizontal overflow) at 375/768/1280 on all 6 routes; zero console/exception entries on load; dark-mode toggle verified end-to-end (click -> html.classList has dark -> computed body bg #111827 -> screenshot shows full dark theme incl. moon icon); sticky header confirmed via computed getComputedStyle position:sticky, top:0 rect stable (page content is still a stub at this stage — PF-M1-05/06/07 not yet built — so a real scroll-past-the-fold check on populated content is deferred, see manual checks); simulated Tab key sequence via CDP Input.dispatchKeyEvent confirmed order skip-link -> logo -> Projects -> About -> Resume -> Contact -> GitHub -> theme toggle, and focus-visible ring box-shadow (2px offset + 4px teal-300 ring) rendered and visible on a nav link in dark mode (screenshot); GitHub https://github.com/JodPdo HTTP 200, LinkedIn HTTP 999 (known anti-bot response, not a failure); no console.* in any component; working tree clean except this board file. Manual checks still needed from a real interactive browser (cannot be done headlessly): mouse/touch scroll confirming header stays visually pinned on a fully-populated page (defer to when PF-M1-05/06/07 land), real hardware keyboard Tab/Shift+Tab feel and ring visibility across both themes end-to-end by a human; light-mode ring contrast is tracked separately as PF-M3-04 (not blocking here).

QA PASS 2026-07-06 (round 2, after fix commit 848528b): initial QA pass (round 1) FAILED on timeline dot alignment — measured markers ~25px (375px) / ~33px (1280px) right of the border-l-2 connector, screenshots confirmed dots floating off the line. frontend-engineer fixed via -left-6/sm:-left-8 on the marker span (components/sections/timeline.tsx:45-54) to match the ol's own padding, keeping marker + connector in the same coordinate space. Re-verified independently: rebuilt (build+lint green again), fresh headless-Edge CDP session (Emulation.setDeviceMetricsOverride), re-measured geometry at 375/1280 — dot-center-to-connector-edge offset now exactly 2px at both (the connector's own border-stroke width), full-page + cropped screenshots visually confirm all 4 dots centered on the line in both themes; no regressions — build+lint green, no horizontal overflow at 375/768/1280, zero console errors/exceptions, dark-mode toggle still flips body bg to #111827, cert section still 0 <a> tags, ol still 4 <li> in order 2022/2024/2025/2026, no mailto:/tel:; contrast re-checked and still AA-compliant in both themes (timeline year/title/body text all >=5:1, most >=11:1).

cards.summary: ADR-0003: ratify Design Brief V2 (docs/DESIGN_BRIEF_V2.md) — direction, deps (gsap + ScrollTrigger, pixi.js dynamic-only), dark-only (remove toggle/light tokens/no-FOUC script), framer-motion decision (brief recommends: GSAP only), display font choice, components/motion/ home. Brief §1 decisions are product-owner-locked.
cards.dod: documented, no contradiction
cards.qa_evidence: QA PASS 2026-07-06 (qa-engineer). git status: exactly docs/SPEC.md, docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md, CLAUDE.md, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md uncommitted, nothing else. SPEC.md Appendix B ADR-0003: dated 2026-07-06, numbered after ADR-0002, complete context/decision(7 pts)/rationale/consequences; deps exactly gsap+ScrollTrigger and pixi.js (dynamic-only, desktop+fine-pointer+idle gate); framer-motion explicitly ruled out (pt.3) and confirmed absent from package.json; dark-only deletions enumerated (pt.4: theme-toggle.tsx, no-FOUC script, .dark block, @custom-variant dark, dark: prefixes); Archivo w500 ruling with alternatives considered (pt.6); Lighthouse amendment (pt.7) matches brief §5 verbatim (mobile Perf>=90 OK IF A11y/BP/SEO>=95 AND CLS<0.1). DESIGN_SYSTEM.md V2 token table: all 11 brief §2 hex values spot-checked present (#0A0A0A #111111 #1C1C1C #2A2A2A #F5F5F0 #999999 #666666 #5EEAD4 #04342C #0F1F1C #16211F); migration rule keeps semantic names/repoints values; removal list covers --gold/--palette-gold, --color-ink/text-ink, --palette-dark-*, light raws. Cross-doc grep for framer across CLAUDE.md/docs: every hit annotated superseded/ruled-out; CLAUDE.md stack line now reads GSAP+ScrollTrigger, lazy pixi.js hero-only, NOT Framer Motion, dark-only (no theme toggle). npm run build: green (8 routes, no errors). npm run lint: clean, no warnings.

cards.summary: Tokens v2 (brief §2 palette/typography) + remove light mode, theme toggle, no-FOUC script + next/font for JetBrains Mono + display face per ADR-0003. Resume/Contact restyle by inheritance.

cards.evidence:
Implemented in commit da73f8e (pushed). CODE REVIEW: PASS (token fidelity hex-by-hex vs ADR-0003; layout.tsx rewrite preserved skip link/single-main/landmarks/metadata; fonts Archivo w500 + JetBrains Mono self-hosted low-CLS; zero stale refs repo-wide; NOTE for V2-04/05/06: --foreground-muted #666666 on #0A0A0A is ~3.5:1 — labels/large-text only, never body copy). QA PASS 2026-07-07 (qa-engineer, resumed after prior session hit its limit — lint clean + zero dark:/ThemeToggle/theme-init grep were verified in the earlier session and not repeated): (1) npm run build green — clean Turbopack build, all 7 routes compiled, zero TS errors. (2) Prod-server sweep (next start :3456, curl'd each route): /=200 /about=200 /projects=200 /resume=200 /contact=200 /projects/aiklao=200 /this-route-does-not-exist=404; no theme-init/no-FOUC script in any route HTML (one grep hit on /about was Next's built-in next-error-h1 boilerplate, unrelated); exactly one
per route (grep -o count=1 each); skip link is first focusable element on all 6 primary routes (only a hidden non-focusable hydration marker div precedes Skip to content immediately after ). (3) Headless-Edge CDP (Emulation.setDeviceMetricsOverride, not --window-size) on / /about /projects at 375x812/768x1024/1280x800 (9 combos): body bg rgb(10,10,10)=#0A0A0A on all 9; JetBrains Mono resolves as real font family (getComputedStyle + document.fonts show loaded); zero consoleAPICalled + zero exceptionThrown across all 9 loads; no h-overflow (scrollWidth===clientWidth for html+body at all breakpoints, 768/1280 minus scrollbar expected); legibility screenshots captured+reviewed (clean dark editorial layout, teal #5EEAD4 readable on #0A0A0A; Home/Projects still render M1 layout with V2 tokens applied — expected, full redesign is PF-V2-04/05, DoD only requires 'all routes render V2 base'). (4) prefers-color-scheme:light emulated via Emulation.setEmulatedMedia on / /about /projects @1280 — matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: light)').matches===true (proves emulation took effect) yet computed body stayed rgb(10,10,10)/rgb(245,245,240); :root{color-scheme:dark} hardcoded; zero prefers-color-scheme media queries in app/+components/ (dark-only is structural). (5) Contrast (WCAG rel-luminance vs #0A0A0A): --foreground #F5F5F0 = 18.10:1 (confirmed as actual rendered body text); --foreground-secondary #999999 = 6.95:1 (AA pass); accent teal #5EEAD4 = 13.38:1, --primary-foreground #04342C on teal = 9.26:1; --foreground-muted #666666 = 3.45:1 — confirms code review's flag but token is NOT consumed anywhere yet (defined in globals.css, zero uses in app/+components/), no current violation, flagged forward for V2-04/05/06 (labels/large-text only, never body copy). Token fidelity re-confirmed hex-by-hex vs brief §2 (page #0A0A0A, surface #111111, hairline #1C1C1C, strong border #2A2A2A, text #F5F5F0/#999999/#666666, accent #5EEAD4/#04342C, mats #0F1F1C/#16211F — all exact). Working tree left clean; scratch/prod-server/headless-Edge all terminated. Verdict: PASS, no bug cards required.

cards.summary: Motion primitives in components/motion/: <Scramble> (E2), <Marquee> (E3, CSS keyframes), <Reveal> (E8), <PinnedHorizontal> (E7, GSAP ScrollTrigger) + reduced-motion plumbing per brief §5.
cards.dod: each demoed on a scratch route, reduced-motion verified
cards.parked: 2026-07-07, session pause. Latest code commit: 453289c (pushed). CODE REVIEW: PASS x2 — original review (CHANGES REQUESTED, one blocker: dead+duplicated reduced-motion hook) then re-review PASS after fix (option a: components/motion/use-prefers-reduced-motion.ts owns the reduce-query exclusively, exports imperative prefersReducedMotion() consumed by scramble.tsx + reactive usePrefersReducedMotion() demoed live via app/scratch/motion/reduced-motion-indicator.tsx; Reveal/PinnedHorizontal stay on gsap.matchMedia; motion-stack/SSR/tokens/CLS/build+lint all confirmed clean). QA GATE: INCOMPLETE — qa-engineer was running the DoD verification when the session was paused; agent stopped cleanly, produced no recorded verdict, working tree left clean. TO RESUME: dispatch a fresh qa-engineer for the full DoD gate on commit 453289c. Demo route is /scratch/motion (noindex, reachable in prod build, deleted when V2-04/05/06 consume the primitives). Checks: npm run build+lint green; next start + headless-Edge CDP (Emulation.setDeviceMetricsOverride, NOT --window-size) on /scratch/motion; NORMAL motion @375/768/1280 — no h-overflow, zero console errors, body bg #0A0A0A, E2 scrambles->exact final text, E3 marquee translating, E8 reveals on scroll, E7 pins+travels @1280 / vertical stack @375; REDUCED motion (Emulation.setEmulatedMedia reduce) — indicator badge reads 'reduce', E2 final text INSTANT (no scrambled frames), E3 paused, E8 instant show, E7 vertical stack no pin, zero console errors; LIVE flip (toggle emulation no reload) updates badge + flips E3 paused/running and E2 hover on/off; dark-only (emulate prefers-color-scheme:light -> stays dark); no CLS. On PASS: record evidence, status -> done, board commit+push. NEXT after V2-03 done: PF-V2-04, PF-V2-05, PF-V2-06 all unblock together (all owner frontend-engineer, WIP cap 1-2) — token rule from e05398d (foreground-muted large/decorative only, #999999 for small labels) binds all three; PF-V2-06 already carries the E7 no-JS fallback forward-condition (see its 'note' field).
cards.qa_gate_2026-07-12: FAIL (qa-engineer, commit 453289c). PASS on: build+lint green, all 4 primitives' behavior, reduced-motion correctness (E2 final-text-instant/E3 paused/E7 vertical-no-pin/E8 instant), live media-flip, dark-only, console-clean. TWO findings, both in-scope so fixed IN-CARD (not separate bug cards; card is still pre-Done, same as the 453289c review-fix cycle). Routed review -> doing -> frontend-engineer. (1) BLOCKING: h-overflow @375 on /scratch/motion (scrollWidth 449 vs clientWidth 375) from app/scratch/motion/reduced-motion-indicator.tsx badge = inline-flex (max-content 433px, no wrap) > 375 viewport; demo-route-only but violates the no-h-overflow@375 DoD; small fix (wrap/stack the badge below sm). (2) FLAG/producer-call: E7 <PinnedHorizontal> pin-engagement = CLS 0.7025 (phased layout-shift measurement, isolated to the primitive's own wrapper components/motion/pinned-horizontal.tsx; GSAP pinType:transform artifact, not visually janky) but 7x the brief §5 <0.1 budget and ships for real in PF-V2-06 -> producer directs: fix at the primitive now, OR produce hard evidence it does NOT contribute to the Lighthouse-measured CLS metric (lab CLS during LH's own scroll pass) and defer only the formal verification to PF-V2-07 — do not defer blind. RE-GATE after fix: re-code-review -> re-QA must re-verify (a) scrollWidth===clientWidth @375 on /scratch/motion, (b) phased CLS on the E7 pin section, plus a no-regression pass on items already green.
cards.resolved: DONE 2026-07-12. Fix commit 6032ea6 (frontend, local-only not pushed): (1) scratch badge inline-flex -> max-w-full flex-wrap gap-x-3 gap-y-1, h-overflow@375 gone (scrollWidth===clientWidth at 375/768/1280, badge width 433->343 wrapped); (2) PinnedHorizontal pinType 'fixed'->'transform' + anticipatePin removed -> E7 phased CLS 0.7025->0.0000 across a full down+up sweep (observer sanity-checked live via a synthetic 0.292 shift, so the zero is a real measurement; pin still travels @1280, stacks @375, unpinned under reduced-motion). CODE REVIEW: PASS (qa->frontend fix reviewed on the isolated 453289c..6032ea6 diff: correct root-cause, no position:fixed ancestry dependency, reduced-motion/mobile-stack branch untouched, badge token-compliant #999999 not #666666). RE-QA: PASS on 6032ea6 (both re-gate numbers confirmed + full no-regression sweep: build+lint green, E2/E3/E7/E8 normal+reduced+live-flip correct, dark-only holds, zero console/exceptions). Scratch route /scratch/motion is NOT yet deleted — producer removes it after V2-04/05/06 have consumed the primitives; no single card should delete it unilaterally (avoid mutual conflict).

cards.summary: Work rows (typographic, replaces card grid on /projects) + hover video previews (E6): muted looping webm <=300KB, preload=none, load on first hover, poster fallback, tap=navigate on touch. Producer sources 4 webm clips with product owner; poster-only acceptable to pass.
cards.dod: hover/touch/keyboard all correct
cards.po_decision: PRODUCT-OWNER DECISION 2026-07-13: SHIP POSTER-ONLY with a designed token-based placeholder. Repo has NO project screenshots and NO webm clips (only the two Jod photos), so E6 has no source media. Build the typographic work rows (replace the /projects card grid, order AiKlao->Typing Race->Tiger Kick->JPD) + the FULL E6 hover/touch/keyboard mechanism, but the hover 'poster' is a clean V2 duotone/typographic panel per project (no screenshot required) rather than a video frame. Wire the <video> path so real muted-looping webm <=300KB (preload=none, load-on-first-hover, poster fallback, tap=navigate on touch) 'just drops in' when the product owner later delivers clips. DoD 'hover/touch/keyboard all correct' still fully applies to the mechanism. The 4 webm clips + real posters remain an OUTSTANDING product-owner asset delivery, tracked but non-blocking for this card.
cards.code_review: PASS 2026-07-16 (code-reviewer, commit a95b8cf). All 10 verification points confirmed: locked order AiKlao->Typing Race->Tiger Kick->JPD via getAllProjects() sort; no <video> emitted / nothing 404s (PROJECT_PREVIEWS empty); hover/focus parity via group-hover+group-focus-within CSS plus shared activate()/deactivate() bound to onMouseEnter+onFocus/onMouseLeave+onBlur; video (when present) tabIndex=-1 aria-hidden, no keyboard trap; touch bails on (hover:none) so first tap navigates; reduced-motion bails via PF-V2-03 prefersReducedMotion(); tokens clean (--foreground-muted unused, --foreground-secondary for labels); exactly one h1 + four h2; data source unchanged (lib/projects.ts gray-matter). Advisory (non-blocking, routed to architect separately, not this card's scope): components/sections/project-card.tsx is now orphaned dead code (docs/ARCHITECTURE.md still lists it) -- left in place. Routed to qa-engineer for DoD gate (hover/touch/keyboard all correct, live at 375/768/1280, reduced-motion, no network request for any preview asset in poster-only state).
cards.qa_verdict: PASS 2026-07-16 (qa-engineer, live Playwright/Chromium verification on `npm run start` prod build, commit 54db0a9 / code a95b8cf). Live-driven checks (34/34 automated assertions green, script + full console captured): (1) order — exactly 4 <h2> in DOM order AiKlao, Typing Race, Tiger Kick, JPD School-Student Registration API. (2) poster-only/no-network — 0 requests matching *.webm|*.mp4 on /projects load AND after hovering all 4 rows (PROJECT_PREVIEWS confirmed empty in app/projects/page.tsx, no <video> element rendered). (3) hover reveal — h2 color transitions to teal rgb(94,234,212) on hover (1280px, fine pointer). (4) keyboard parity (the crux) — Tab reaches each row's <Link>, focus produces the IDENTICAL rgb(94,234,212) teal as mouse hover (measured after transition settles, matches exactly), focus-visible ring confirmed present (inset box-shadow ring 2px), Tab traverses all 4 rows in order with no trap. (5) touch/coarse-pointer — emulated touch context (hasTouch+isMobile), single tap on a row navigates directly to /projects/<slug> with no intermediate state (verified via waitForURL race-free harness + a standalone debug repro). (6) reduced-motion — emulated `reducedMotion:'reduce'`; globals.css collapses all transition-duration to 0.01ms (1e-5s, the standard non-literal-0s a11y trick, app/globals.css:104-113) confirmed on both the title and preview-panel border; state still updates (color changes) but with no perceptible animation. (7) responsive — 0px horizontal overflow (scrollWidth==clientWidth) at 375/768/1280. (8) structure/content — exactly one h1 'Projects', exactly four h2 in locked order, no phone-number-shaped string, no email-shaped string in rendered body text. (9) standard bar — `npm run build` green (Next 16.2.10 Turbopack, static /projects), `npm run lint` clean (0 output), zero console errors/pageerrors across normal/keyboard-only/touch-emulated/reduced-motion passes, all 4 case-study routes return HTTP 200, body background-color == rgb(10,10,10) (#0A0A0A). (10) no regression — Home's 3 featured project links (aiklao, typing-race, tiger-kick per PF-M1-03) all still resolve 200, zero console errors on Home + nav. ADVISORY (non-blocking to this card, filed as PF-V2-08 for frontend-engineer): live axe-core 4.12.1 scan of /projects found 1 'serious' color-contrast violation (1.14:1 vs required 3:1) on the oversized decorative ordinal numerals in WorkPoster (aria-hidden="true", pointer-events-none, 5%-opacity text, work-row.tsx ~line 77) — element is non-interactive/AT-hidden decoration (plausible WCAG 1.4.3 'pure decoration' exception) but will also surface in Lighthouse's a11y audit, so it must be resolved or explicitly exempted before the PF-V2-07 exit gate. Does not block PF-V2-05: unrelated to the card's DoD text ('hover/touch/keyboard all correct'), which is fully PASS. VERDICT: PASS. Handoff to producer for Done.

cards.summary: About/How-I-work rework: pinned horizontal 5-step (E7), jod-working photo mat, timeline restyle to V2. Mobile/reduced-motion degrade to vertical stack.
cards.dod: mobile degrade correct
cards.note: FORWARD-CONDITION from PF-V2-03 code review (2026-07-07): <PinnedHorizontal> (E7) as built clips panels 2+ in the narrow edge case of a motion-safe desktop with JS fully failed (content stays in DOM for SEO/reader-mode). Acceptable for the primitive, but this card ships REAL E7 content — it must NOT depend on those panels being reachable only with JS. Provide a CSS/<noscript>-reachable fallback (or equivalent) so the global 'content not lost if JS fails' DoD holds on a real page. ADDED FORWARD-CONDITIONS from PF-V2-03 fix code review (2026-07-12, commit 6032ea6 switched E7 to pinType:'transform'): (a) transform-pinning makes the pinned section a STACKING CONTEXT / CONTAINING BLOCK — if this card places any position:sticky or position:fixed element inside a panel, its containing block changes; design around that. (b) transform-held elements can show sub-pixel TEXT BLUR on some engines during pin travel — QA must eyeball the large display type mid-pin on a real render, not just headless numbers.
cards.code_review: PASS 2026-07-16 (code-reviewer, commit 8e060a8). Both forward-conditions CONFIRMED CORRECT: (1) noscript fallback in components/sections/how-i-work.tsx:64-88 scopes to .howiwork-pin / >div / >div>div matching PinnedHorizontal's actual DOM tree (pinned-horizontal.tsx:88-96), reverting motion-safe:md:* flex-row/w-screen classes to a stacked column with no JS; (2) no position:sticky/fixed exists inside any pinned panel — the only lg:sticky (PhotoMat, pivot section) sits in normal flow outside .howiwork-pin. Also clean: raw jod-working.png not shipped to public/ (only 13KB duotone webp), certifications still 0 <a> tags, timeline 4 entries verbatim incl. 2026 unconfirmed-completion fallback, tokens/a11y/landmarks/console all clean. Non-blocking advisory: how-i-work.tsx uses curly apostrophes (U+2019) vs straight elsewhere on the page/copy doc — cosmetic glyph drift only, does not gate. Routed to qa-engineer for full DoD gate (mobile degrade correct + the two forward-condition checks live + text-blur eyeball per note).
cards.resolved: DONE 2026-07-16 (qa-engineer, live Playwright verification on prod build @ 59b9cf4/8e060a8, cross-engine Chromium/WebKit/Firefox). Forward-condition #1 (no-JS): confirmed live under javaScriptEnabled:false — all 5 panels present/readable, track flex-direction column, overflow-x visible, no clipping. Forward-condition #2 (stacking context/sticky + text blur): 0 sticky/fixed elements inside .howiwork-pin (only lg:sticky PhotoMat sits outside it, confirmed live); screenshots across 8 points of full pin travel + forced sub-pixel transform offsets on 3 engines show no visible text blur. Mobile/reduced-motion degrade literal DoD line confirmed concretely: 768/375 and prefers-reduced-motion@1280 all show flex-direction column with no pin-spacer element (pin genuinely never engages), no h-overflow; 1280 motion-safe pins+scrubs correctly. Dark tokens clean (#0A0A0A body, no ad-hoc hex, --foreground-muted unused in new files). Certifications still 0 <a>, timeline 4 entries incl. 2026 unconfirmed-completion phrasing, jod-working image has descriptive alt, no phone/email, all internal /about links 200. axe-core 0 violations; production Lighthouse mobile 96/100/100/100, CLS 0 (dev-server 83 perf noted as dev-mode overhead, not representative — production number is the valid signal; full formal gate still owned by PF-V2-07). No bugs filed. Verdict: PASS.

cards.summary: Full V2 gate per brief §5: JS budget (<250KB gzip on / excl. lazy pixi), Lighthouse mobile Perf >= 90 + A11y/BP/SEO >= 95 + CLS < 0.1, explicit prefers-reduced-motion pass (E2 final text, E3 paused, E4/E5 off, E7 vertical, E8 instant), keyboard/a11y AA, link-check.
cards.dod: all pass or bug cards filed

cards.summary: Bug filed by qa-engineer during PF-V2-05 DoD gate (2026-07-16, live axe-core 4.12.1 run against /projects on prod build, commit a95b8cf): axe flags 'serious' color-contrast (1.14:1, needs 3:1) on the oversized decorative ordinal numerals in components/projects/work-row.tsx WorkPoster (span aria-hidden="true" pointer-events-none text-foreground/[0.05], e.g. line ~77), 3 nodes (typing-race, tiger-kick rows shown in the trace; aiklao/jpd share the same markup). The element is aria-hidden + pointer-events-none + 5%-opacity purely-decorative background texture (arguably WCAG 1.4.3 'pure decoration' exception), so this is likely a false positive, but it will also surface in Lighthouse's a11y audit (same axe engine) and must be resolved or explicitly justified before the PF-V2-07 exit-gate Lighthouse/axe run. Fix options: bump opacity enough to clear 3:1 without breaking the duotone-texture look, or add a documented axe exclusion for this decorative pattern (get architect/producer sign-off on the exception rather than silently ignoring).
cards.dod: axe-core run against /projects shows 0 violations on the WorkPoster ordinal, OR a documented + producer-approved exception is recorded in docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md for decorative aria-hidden text; re-verified by qa-engineer before/at the PF-V2-07 exit gate
cards.note: Non-blocking for PF-V2-05 (unrelated to that card's DoD 'hover/touch/keyboard all correct', which PASSED). Blocking for the PF-V2-07 milestone exit gate if unresolved by then.

cards.qa: PASS 2026-07-06 (qa-engineer, commits 5d974f2 + fix e7a3c1a): code review passed prior (heading order h1->h2 fixed, ruling-compliant link rendering, only gray-matter added as a dependency). npm run build + npm run lint green. Prod server (localhost:3000) /projects: exactly one <h1> ('Projects'), exactly 4 <h2> card titles in DOM order AiKlao -> Typing Race -> Tiger Kick -> JPD School-Student Registration API (matches CLAUDE.md #4 / ARCHITECTURE.md order field); 4 title links to /projects/aiklao, /projects/typing-race, /projects/tiger-kick, /projects/jpd-api each HTTP 200 on the prod server; JPD card contains zero external-link markup (no <a target=_blank> inside its <article>, consistent with its link-less frontmatter per the 2026-07-06 ruling); Typing Race card has exactly one external link, text 'Live', href=https://race.aiklaotrip.com, target=_blank rel="noopener noreferrer" (verified per-article via DOM parse, not page-wide grep, so header/footer social links were excluded from the count). Headless-Edge CDP (Emulation.setDeviceMetricsOverride, port 9333) on /projects: no horizontal overflow at 375/768/1280 (document.documentElement.scrollWidth === clientWidth all three sizes); grid column check via getBoundingClientRect of first two <article> cards — 375px: different top values (271 vs 778) = stacked/1-column; 768px and 1280px: identical top values with cards side-by-side (left offsets 24/388.5 and 106.5/644.5) = 2-column, consistent with the page's grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 markup; zero console errors/warnings/exceptions captured across all three navigations; dark-mode toggle clicked (button labelled 'Switch to dark theme') -> html gains .dark class -> body background computed to rgb(17, 24, 39) = #111827 exactly as required. Home regression: curl / = HTTP 200, exactly 3 featured card titles present (AiKlao, Typing Race, Tiger Kick; no JPD), matching PF-M1-03's already-QA'd featured set — unchanged. No phone number or email string found in /projects HTML. Note (non-blocking, out of scope for this card): /projects/[slug] is still the PF-M2-06 placeholder — generateStaticParams/dynamicParams=false is not wired yet, so a nonexistent slug currently returns 200 instead of 404; this is explicitly PF-M2-06 scope per ARCHITECTURE.md §1, not a PF-M2-01 regression, and PF-M2-06 is already backlog with PF-M2-01 as a dependency.
